title: Angry Birds Dream Blast
notes:
Dream Blast 2.3 is here!
A new era of dreaming begins. Dive into our biggest update yet:
- All-new Dream Pass: Help the birds accomplish their dreams, like building a dream house or becoming an astronaut! Earn rewards as you progress.
- Next-gen visuals: Experience the world of Dream Blast in a stunning new art style.
- More levels: We still release fresh new puzzles every single week!
- This is just the beginning: There's plenty more in store for Dream Blast.
Dream big.
